title: Asset IDs for files in the files gallery
excerpt: I have run the full export of all board data from Monday.com, which resulted in a zip file with four folders. What I’m trying to do is consolidate all assets (both those in the updates and also in the Files tab) for each…

posts.author: MikeAtVallen (Michael Sowa)
posts.cookedHtml: I have run the full export of all board data from Monday.com, which resulted in a zip file with four folders. What I’m trying to do is consolidate all assets (both those in the updates and also in the Files tab) for each pulse. I see that the updates export spreadsheet file only has the asset IDs for the files added to a pulse’s updates … how do I get an export spreadsheet that ties the Files tab assets back to the Item ID for the pulse in a board?
